title: aria-busy on Loading Buttons Across Multiple Components
description: Multiple components show a Loader2 spinner when a mutation is in progress but lack aria-busy on the button element, so screen readers do not announce the loading state. Add aria-busy to buttons in ContactForm, CsvImportModal, ManualAddForm, SaveSearchPopover, ShareTimeline, SharePipeline, SettingsResumeSection, and SettingsTemplatesSection.

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to ContactForm submit button
userStories.description: ContactForm.jsx ContactFormActions (~line 86) renders a submit Button with disabled={isPending} but no aria-busy. Add aria-busy={isPending} to the submit Button so screen readers announce the saving state.
acceptanceCriteria: ContactForm.jsx ContactFormActions submit Button has aria-busy={isPending}

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to CsvImportModal import button
userStories.description: CsvImportModal.jsx (~line 119) renders an Import Button with disabled={!file || isPending} and a Loader2 spinner when isPending but lacks aria-busy. Add aria-busy={isPending} to the Import Button.

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to ManualAddForm submit button
userStories.description: ManualAddForm.jsx (~line 29) renders a submit Button with disabled={isPending} and shows 'Saving…' text when pending but lacks aria-busy. Add aria-busy={isPending} to the submit Button.

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to SaveSearchPopover save button
userStories.description: SaveSearchPopover.jsx (~line 55) renders a save Button with disabled={!name.trim() || createMutation.isPending} but no aria-busy. Add aria-busy={createMutation.isPending} to the save Button.

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to ShareTimeline revoke and generate buttons
userStories.description: ShareTimeline.jsx ShareCard component (~line 64) renders a Revoke link Button with disabled={isRevoking} and Loader2 spinner but no aria-busy. The NoShare component (~line 87) renders a Generate link Button with disabled={isCreating} and Loader2 but no aria-busy. Add aria-busy={isRevoking} to the Revoke Button and aria-busy={isCreating} to the Generate Button.
acceptanceCriteria: ShareTimeline.jsx Revoke link Button has aria-busy={isRevoking}
ShareTimeline.jsx Generate link Button has aria-busy={isCreating}

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to SharePipeline revoke and generate buttons
userStories.description: SharePipeline.jsx mirrors ShareTimeline structure — the Revoke link Button and Generate link Button also show Loader2 spinners when isRevoking/isCreating but lack aria-busy. Read SharePipeline.jsx and add aria-busy={isRevoking} to the Revoke Button and aria-busy={isCreating} to the Generate Button.
acceptanceCriteria: SharePipeline.jsx Revoke link Button has aria-busy={isRevoking}
SharePipeline.jsx Generate link Button has aria-busy={isCreating}

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to SettingsResumeSection delete button
userStories.description: SettingsResumeSection.jsx ResumeFileCard (~line 76) renders a Remove resume Button with disabled={isDeleting || isUploading} and Loader2 when isDeleting but no aria-busy. Add aria-busy={isDeleting} to the Remove resume Button.
acceptanceCriteria: SettingsResumeSection.jsx Remove resume Button has aria-busy={isDeleting}

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to SettingsTemplatesSection rename confirm and delete buttons
userStories.description: SettingsTemplatesSection.jsx TemplateRow (~line 78) renders a Confirm rename Button with disabled={isUpdating} and a Delete Button with disabled={isDeleting}, both lacking aria-busy. Add aria-busy={isUpdating} to the Confirm rename Button and aria-busy={isDeleting} to the Delete Button.
acceptanceCriteria: SettingsTemplatesSection.jsx Confirm rename Button has aria-busy={isUpdating}
